free_text: The spectra  of  fast  photoprotons from the reaction
bremsstrahlung end-point energies from 50 to 84 MeV.
The   observed   kinematical   behaviour   and   the
comparison  of  the  measured cross section with the
theory shows that  the  threshold  photoprotons  are
emitted  through  a direct interaction of the photon
with  the  1p   proton,   while   a   quasi-deuteron
